name: One-Hand Wonder
challenge: Hit one shot one-handed during this hole, then finish double bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Hit one shot one-handed during this hole, then finish double bogey or better. Reward: +4.

name: Opposite-Hand Escape
challenge: On one short shot or putt, use your opposite-handed stance and still finish double bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On one short shot or putt, use your opposite-handed stance and still finish double bogey or better. Reward: +4.

name: Putter Off the Fringe
challenge: From off the green, use putter at least once and still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. From off the green, use putter at least once and still make bogey or better. Reward: +3.

name: Feet Together
challenge: Hit one full or partial shot with your feet together, then finish double bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Hit one full or partial shot with your feet together, then finish double bogey or better. Reward: +4.

name: Knockdown Artist
challenge: Declare one shot a low punch or knockdown before hitting it, then pull it off and finish bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Declare one shot a low punch or knockdown before hitting it, then pull it off and finish bogey or better. Reward: +3.

name: Caddie's Choice
challenge: Let another player choose your club for one shot, then finish double bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Let another player choose your club for one shot, then finish double bogey or better. Reward: +4.

name: No Glove, No Problem
challenge: Play the entire hole without a glove and finish bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Play the entire hole without a glove and finish bogey or better. Reward: +3.

name: Three-Quarter Specialist
challenge: On one full swing, intentionally hit a three-quarter shot and keep it in play. Finish double bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On one full swing, intentionally hit a three-quarter shot and keep it in play. Finish double bogey or better. Reward: +3.

name: Texas Wedge Life
challenge: Use putter from off the green at least once and finish bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Use putter from off the green at least once and finish bogey or better. Reward: +3.

name: Called Bank Shot
challenge: Call that your chip or putt will use a slope, bank, or side contour, then execute it well enough to finish within 4 feet or hole it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Call that your chip or putt will use a slope, bank, or side contour, then execute it well enough to finish within 4 feet or hole it. Reward: +4.

name: Eyes on the Prize
challenge: On one short putt inside 4 feet, hold your finish dramatically until the ball drops. Still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On one short putt inside 4 feet, hold your finish dramatically until the ball drops. Still make bogey or better. Reward: +3.

name: Hero Pose
challenge: After one shot, hold a ridiculously confident pose until the ball lands. If the shot is acceptable and you finish double bogey or better, score it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. After one shot, hold a ridiculously confident pose until the ball lands. If the shot is acceptable and you finish double bogey or better, score it. Reward: +3.

name: The Bump-and-Run
challenge: Play one intentional bump-and-run chip and get it onto the green or fringe. Finish bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Play one intentional bump-and-run chip and get it onto the green or fringe. Finish bogey or better. Reward: +3.

name: Club Flip Approved
challenge: After one clearly good shot, do a club twirl or flip. If the group agrees the shot earned it and you finish double bogey or better, score it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. After one clearly good shot, do a club twirl or flip. If the group agrees the shot earned it and you finish double bogey or better, score it. Reward: +3.

name: Walk-In Putt
challenge: Before a putt outside 6 feet, start walking after contact as if it's going in. If it drops, score it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Before a putt outside 6 feet, start walking after contact as if it's going in. If it drops, score it. Reward: +4.

name: Half-Swing Hustle
challenge: Take one intentional half-swing on a recovery or wedge shot and still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Take one intentional half-swing on a recovery or wedge shot and still make bogey or better. Reward: +3.

name: No Tee, Brave Soul
challenge: On one tee shot, hit without using a tee when legal to do so, and keep it in play. Finish double bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On one tee shot, hit without using a tee when legal to do so, and keep it in play. Finish double bogey or better. Reward: +4.

name: Back-Foot Punch
challenge: Hit one shot intentionally off the back foot and keep it in play. Finish double bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Hit one shot intentionally off the back foot and keep it in play. Finish double bogey or better. Reward: +4.

name: Putt With Personality
challenge: Use an exaggeratedly serious pre-putt routine on one putt, then make it from 5 feet or more.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Use an exaggeratedly serious pre-putt routine on one putt, then make it from 5 feet or more. Reward: +3.

name: The Listener
challenge: You must take swing advice from another player on one shot. If you follow it and still finish double bogey or better, score it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. You must take swing advice from another player on one shot. If you follow it and still finish double bogey or better, score it. Reward: +4.

name: Flighted Finish
challenge: Hit one intentionally flighted wedge or short iron and keep it under control. Finish bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Hit one intentionally flighted wedge or short iron and keep it under control. Finish bogey or better. Reward: +3.

name: Barely Legal
challenge: Use the strangest club in your bag for one reasonable shot and still finish double bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Use the strangest club in your bag for one reasonable shot and still finish double bogey or better. Reward: +4.

name: One-Club Wizard
challenge: Use the same club for two consecutive non-putt shots and still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Use the same club for two consecutive non-putt shots and still make bogey or better. Reward: +4.

name: The Toe Poke
challenge: On one recovery shot, intentionally just advance the ball safely instead of trying hero nonsense. Still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On one recovery shot, intentionally just advance the ball safely instead of trying hero nonsense. Still make bogey or better. Reward: +3.

name: Declare the Miss
challenge: Before an approach, openly declare your intended miss side. If the result matches and you finish bogey or better, score it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Before an approach, openly declare your intended miss side. If the result matches and you finish bogey or better, score it. Reward: +3.

name: Lucky Bounce Believer
challenge: Before one shot, call for a generous bounce or kick. If the ball gets one and you still finish double bogey or better, score it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Before one shot, call for a generous bounce or kick. If the ball gets one and you still finish double bogey or better, score it. Reward: +3.

name: Soft Hands
challenge: On one greenside shot, use your highest-lofted club and leave it on the green. Finish bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On one greenside shot, use your highest-lofted club and leave it on the green. Finish bogey or better. Reward: +4.

name: No Stepping Off
challenge: On one full shot, once you address the ball, you may not step off. Hit it and keep it in play. Finish double bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On one full shot, once you address the ball, you may not step off. Hit it and keep it in play. Finish double bogey or better. Reward: +4.

name: Trust the Read
challenge: Take one putt without a practice stroke and hole it from 6 feet or more.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Take one putt without a practice stroke and hole it from 6 feet or more. Reward: +4.

name: Art Project
challenge: Attempt one intentionally shaped or creative shot that the group agrees was legitimate. If you pull it off and finish double bogey or better, score it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Attempt one intentionally shaped or creative shot that the group agrees was legitimate. If you pull it off and finish double bogey or better, score it. Reward: +4.
